prompt_text:
### Demographics: 68-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 95.1 kg; Height 175.9 cm; BMI 30.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 199mg/dL; 9 months ago 173mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 141mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 99.2kg; 9 months ago 93.6kg; 6 months ago 96.3kg; 3 months ago 91.1kg; current 95.1kg), Height (12 months ago 175.9cm; 9 months ago 175.9cm; 6 months ago 175.9cm; 3 months ago 175.9cm; current 175.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 30.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 88mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 10U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; current 20mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 1061mg/g; 9 months ago 757mg/g; 6 months ago 762mg/g; 3 months ago 1080mg/g; current 870mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 118mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 115mg/dL; 3 months ago 115mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
